articles.title: Ukraine strings nets over cities as killer drones turn streets into war zones - NPR
articles.description: In eastern Ukraine, white nylon nets now stretch over roads and city streets, a low-tech defense against deadly FPV drones that dominate the battlefield and threaten civilians near the front line.
articles.content: IZIUM, Ukraine It's not the sight of 19th century buildings pockmarked by shell fragments and bullets that shocks visitors most in this eastern Ukrainian town. It's the fact that they drive into the … [+5224 chars]

articles.title: Gamers react with overwhelming disgust to DLSS 5's generative AI glow-ups - Ars Technica
articles.description: Nvidia's next frame-gen tech goes way beyond upscaling, and not in a good way...
